tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You're a doll[/tab]

Your eyes see it all
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
And how do I make you[/tab]

How do I make you
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
How do I make you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Wanna see me[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
You're so young[/tab]

But your feelings are deep
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
And how do I make you[/tab]

How do I make you
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
How do I make you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Feel for me[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
You put your head on my pillow[/tab]

And you're fast asleep
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
And how do I make you[/tab]

How do I make you
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
How do I make you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Dream about me[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
Ooh, ooh, baby[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
The world's a wall of ice[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]
You're gonna need someone[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]
To treat you warm[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
And keep you nice[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]
I like the way you dance[/tab]

The way you spin
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
And how do I make you[/tab]

How do I make you
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
How do I make you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Spin for me[/tab]


[Instrumental]
| [ch]Em[/ch]  | [ch]Em[/ch]  | [ch]C[/ch]   | [ch]C[/ch]   |
| [ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]E[/ch]   | [ch]F[/ch]   | [ch]G[/ch]   | [ch]G[/ch]


[Verse 5]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
You put your head on my pillow[/tab]

And you're fast asleep
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]
And how do I make you[/tab]

How do I make you
[tab]                 [ch]F[/ch]
How do I make you[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]    N.C.
Dream about me[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Dream about me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Dream about me, woo[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Dream about me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Dream about me, woo[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Dream about me[/tab]

Dream about me, woo[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Dream about me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
Dream about me[/tab]

[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch]  | [ch]Am[/ch]  | [ch]C[/ch]   | [ch]C[/ch]   |
